zh.Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States: 美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林
zh.lifeSummary: Jehu Sullivan是John Sullivan的兒子，於1796年出生在美國南卡羅來納州。他和Sullivan至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於從1857年到1860年在美國阿拉巴馬州沃克。

zh-hans.Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States: 美国阿肯色州霍特 斯普林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jehu Sullivan是John Sullivan的儿子，于1796年出生在美国南卡罗来纳州。他和Sullivan至少有3个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于从1857年到1860年在美国亚拉巴马州沃克。

nameMeanings.name: Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

variants.name: O'Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Declan, Kieran, Cathal, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, Seamus.
Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabhán’, a personal name from súil ‘eye’ + dubh ‘dark’ + the diminutive suffix -án. Compare Sullivan .

nameMeanings.name: Jehu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Hebrew, Welsh: relationship name from the Hebrew Biblical name (‘Jehova is he’).

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Slave Rebellion
historicEvents.description: "On June 16, 1822,  Denmark Vesey a free and self-educated African American leads a slave rebellion called ""the rising."" The interesting thing about this rebellion is that it does not really happen. The only thing the judges have to go on is the testimony of people that witness it."

historicEvents.title: Fort Sumter Constructed
historicEvents.description: In 1829 Fort Sumter is constructed in the Charleston Harbor, South Carolina. Fort Sumter is most known for being the site of the first shots of the Civil War. It is barely ready when the American Civil War starts.

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
In 1860, South Carolina quit the United States because its citizens were in favor of slavery and President Lincoln was not. The Civil War started a year later.

en.lifeSummary: Jehu Sullivan was born in 1796, in South Carolina, United States as the son of John Sullivan. He had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Sullivan. He died from 1857 to 1860, in Walker, Alabama, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Jehu Sullivan est né en 1796, à Caroline du Sud, États-Unis, fils de John Sullivan. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Sullivan. Il est décédé du 1857 au 1860, à Walker, Alabama, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Jehu Sullivan wurde 1796 in South Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten, als Sohn von John Sullivan geboren. Er hatte mit Sullivan mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb von 1857 bis 1860 in Walker, Alabama, Vereinigte Staaten.

ja.lifeSummary: Jehu Sullivanは1796年にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州でJohn Sullivanの息子として生まれた。彼はSullivanとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼はから1857年まで1860年にアメリカ合衆国アラバマ州ウォーカーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jehu Sullivan(은)는 1796년 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주에서 John Sullivan의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Sullivan(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1857년 부터 1860년 까지 미국 앨라배마 주 워커에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Jehu Sullivan родился в 1796 г. в местности Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. Его отца звали John Sullivan. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей от Sullivan. Он умер с 1857 по 1860 в местности валкир, Алабама, Соединенные штаты.
